title: Grandpa Pepe’s Broccoli and Macaroni
content:
Grandpa Pepe’s Broccoli and Macaroni

Morning sorry took so long

Cover bottom of pot with coating of olive oil. Cut up 5 or six cloves of garlic. Cut them big incase someone doesnt like garlic. Big pieces easy to remove

I only use the florets of broccoli lf u love broccoli u can use whole thing.

Put garlic and broccoli in same time dont burn lightly sauté.

Add 32 onces of chicken broth cook about hour. Add 8 ounces white wine. Season with pepper salt garlic powder to your taste.

Enjoy your dinner
context: From document: Grandpa Pepe’s Broccoli and Macaroni
